LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SANFORD CIPINKO, LAW OFFICES OF SANFORD M CIPINKO AND TIMOTHY PERRY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 5, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 4, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY, 302, NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE JUDGE PRO TEM ADOPTS HIS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ANDREA NARINS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR AN IN CAMERA REVIEW OF DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOVING PAPERS ARE IMPOSSIBLY DISORGANIZED AND THERE IS NO CLEAR RELIEF SOUGHT. SANCTIONS ARE DENIED AS TO BOTH PARTIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Vacated

Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Disco Requests
Off Calendar Dec-23-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE JUDGE PRO TEM ADOPTS HIS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ANDREA NARINS' MOTION To Compel Further Responses To Discovery Requests is DENIED. Plaintiff's request for an in camera review of documents is DENIED. Plaintiff's moving papers are impossibly disorganized and there is no clear relief sought. Sanctions are DENIED as to both parties. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM PETER VAN ZANDT, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

DEFENDANTS SANFORD CIPINKO, LAW OFFICES OF SANFORD M CIPINKO and TIMOTHY PERRY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is continued to November 5, 2013 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B.
